title: Anti Trader Despawn
description: This 1.21.4 Datapack adds a feature in which wandering traders with a NameTag on them DON'T Despawn!
body: This NEW Datapack makes it so Wandering Traders that have a nametag cannot despawn, this is useful for wandering traders that sell gunpowder in which is VERY VERY useful and a way around spending hours on a gunpowder farm!
